description_long: This lamp features a retro-industrial design with a rectangular wooden base housing several dials, switches, and a large circular gauge, reminiscent of vintage control panels. Two exposed incandescent-style bulbs are mounted above the base, each encased in a protective metal cage and supported by gray metal piping that forms an angular, mechanical structure. The base includes a prominent toggle switch, a rotary knob, and a small red-and-green indicator, suggesting interactive or functional elements. A black electrical cord with a plug extends from the back, indicating it is powered by mains electricity. The overall construction combines wood, metal, and glass, giving it a robust, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban or industrial-themed environments. The lamp's unique blend of functional controls and exposed bulbs makes it both a lighting fixture and a decorative statement piece.
description: A retro-industrial tabletop lamp with a wooden base, exposed bulbs in metal cages, and vintage control panel features. The design combines wood, metal piping, and glass for a robust, mechanical look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden base with dials, switches, a large gauge, and both caged bulbs clearly visible above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the base, the arrangement of the metal piping, and the electrical cord extending from the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden base, the cord attachment, and the rear profiles of the bulb cages and piping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the piping structure and the alignment of the bulbs and cages from a different angle.
